claims.summary: Prompt budgets classify requested output as short, medium, or deep.
claims.disposition: Verified exact 512/513/1024/1025 boundaries and transition evidence in the full bridge suite.

claims.summary: Nonempty content after marker stripping can still be a semantic vacuum.
claims.disposition: Accepted as a quality concern; mechanism clarified that the helper only classifies marker remainder and broader graded quality evidence is separate.

claims.summary: Dense word salad and the 1025-token boundary should be compared directly.
claims.disposition: Routed to an equal-budget bounded fixture; syntactic entropy will not be treated as proof of meaning or meaninglessness.

claims.summary: High textual entropy without semantic energy should reject live output.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 provider quality and fallback-contract authority because it would alter accepted live prose.
